pilot_summary.objective: Validate the core experimental pipeline (absorption detection -> steering -> probing -> correlation) on a single SAE configuration before scaling up.
pilot_summary.target_sae: Gemma-2-2B, Gemma Scope, layer 8, dictionary size 16K

phases.name: Absorption Detection
phases.description: Run Chanin differential correlation metric on first-letter features (A-Z) for Gemma-2-2B layer 8, 16K dict.
phases.pass_criteria: At least 10 features with absorption rate > 10% detected; metric computation completes without error; output is valid JSON with feature_id, absorption_rate, absorbing_latents fields

phases.name: Feature Steering
phases.description: Steer each first-letter feature at strengths [1.0, 2.0, 5.0, 10.0]. Include random feature baseline (26 random latents) and null steering control.
phases.pass_criteria: Random baseline steering success < 15%; At least 5 first-letter features show >30% steering success; Null steering shows < 5% effect; computation completes within timeout

phases.name: Sparse Probing
phases.description: Train k-sparse linear probes (k=1, 5, 10) on first-letter classification. Measure F1 using main feature latents vs. all latents.
phases.pass_criteria: Full-latent probing F1 > 0.6; k=1 sparse probing F1 > 0.3; Absorbed features show lower F1 than non-absorbed (directional); computation completes within timeout

phases.name: Correlation Analysis
phases.description: Compute Pearson/Spearman correlation between absorption rate and steering success / probing F1. Fit linear model. Test shuffled label control.
phases.pass_criteria: Shuffled control correlation |r| < 0.15; Analysis script runs without error; All p-values correctly computed; Confidence intervals reported

proceed_to_full: Absorption detection yields >= 10 features with rate > 10%
Steering pipeline produces interpretable success rates (random baseline < 15%)
Probing pipeline produces non-random F1 scores (> 0.3 for k=1)
abort_conditions: Zero absorbed features found (indicates SAE or metric issue)
Random baseline steering success > 30% (indicates non-specific steering)
All first-letter features show < 10% steering success (task may be too hard)
Probing F1 < 0.2 for all configurations (task may be ill-posed)
pivot_conditions: Absorption rates are all < 5% -> try different SAE config or metric
Steering success uncorrelated with absorption but high overall -> focus on probing only
Probing shows strong correlation but steering doesn't -> H1 falsified, H2 supported

sample_count_note: Pilot uses 100 prompts per feature for steering (n=2600 total data points for correlation). This exceeds the minimum n=100 per the planning detail and provides adequate power for medium-to-large effect sizes.
